sections.paragraph:
Ἱεραπολίτης, ου, ὁ (Aa 1, 90, 1 v.l.) inhabitant of Hierapolis Παπίας … ὁ Ἱεραπολίτης Papias (6 and 7). S. Ἱεράπολις.

Aa Aa = Acta apostolorum apocrypha—List 5

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Papias Papias , early Christian writer, II a.d.—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 469
